::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# load packages
library(readxl) 
library(tidyverse)
```
:::





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
episodes <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2023/2023-08-08/episodes.csv')
sauces <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2023/2023-08-08/sauces.csv')
seasons <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2023/2023-08-08/seasons.csv')
```
:::




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
cities <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-05-12/cities.csv')
links <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-05-12/links.csv')
```
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
linked_cities <- links |> 
  left_join(cities, join_by(source == id)) |> 
  rename_with(.fn = \(x) paste0("source_", x), 
              .cols = name:continent) |> 
  left_join(cities, join_by(target == id))
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
linked_cities |> 
  filter(is.na(source_name) | is.na(name))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 0 × 14
# ℹ 14 variables: source <chr>, target <chr>, source_name <chr>,
#   source_lng <dbl>, source_lat <dbl>, source_country <chr>,
#   source_countrycd <chr>, source_continent <chr>, name <chr>, lng <dbl>,
#   lat <dbl>, country <chr>, countrycd <chr>, continent <chr>
```


:::
:::



How many cities are not linked to a sister city?


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
cities |> 
  anti_join(linked_cities,
            by = join_by(id == source))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
